A SURVEY OF THE DAMAGE FROM WEDNESDAY EVENINGS THUNDERSTORMS RESULTED IN THREE CONFIRMED TORNADOES IN WEST TENNESSEE. THESE TORNADOES AFFECTED AREAS IN MADISON, GIBSON, AND CARROLL COUNTIES. IN ADDITION TO THESE TORNADOES, WIDESPREAD DAMAGE FROM STRAIGHT- LINE WINDS EXCEEDING 80 MPH WAS SURVEYED. TREE DAMAGE WAS WIDESPREAD WITH SEVERAL HOMES SUSTAINING ROOF DAMAGE. NUMEROUS UTILITY POLES WERE DOWNED AS WELL. EF1 RATING FOR ALL 3 TORNADOES.

A DAMAGE SURVEY REVEALED THAT A TORNADO BRIEFLY TOUCHED DOWN IN THE COMMUNITY OF CHRISTMASVILLE, TN IN NORTHERN HAYWOOD COUNTY. THE TORNADO PRODUCED SOME ROOF DAMAGE TO THE HICKORY GROVE MISSIONARY BAPTIST CHURCH. A CEMETERY NEXT TO THE CHURCH HAD SEVERAL SMALL HEADSTONES KNOCKED DOWN. ONE LARGE TREE ALONG WITH SEVERAL LARGE TREE LIMBS WERE BLOWN DOWN.
